message:
test(cli): add 55 tests for e2e_runner module

Cover DurationClass (as_str, default, serde), classify_duration
(all slow/fast/unknown suites, tag override), matches_pattern
(edge cases: substring, wildcard prefix/suffix, multiple wildcards,
empty name), parse_assertions (empty/no-match/case-insensitive/
multiline/ANSI), output_excerpt and truncate_output (boundary
conditions), RunConfig default values, SuiteResult/RunReport/Suite
serde roundtrips, format_summary all-pass path, SuiteRegistry
(empty/no-dir/non-test files/get nonexistent), extract_metadata
(shebang, tags, empty), filter combinations, artifact writing
(pass/none root), native suite constants.

Total: 69 tests (14 pre-existing + 55 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
